title: White House crypto advisor Patrick Witt slams Jamie Dimon's stablecoin yield logic as Trump takes clear side in the debate, and more
message_html: White House crypto advisor Patrick Witt slams Jamie Dimon's stablecoin yield logic as Trump takes clear side in the debate, and more ...
snippet: The following article is adapted from The Block’s newsletter, The Daily, which comes out on weekday afternoons.
